acquisition method: we sought to validate the expression of osteopontin and MMP3 by HR-MRM.
alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide (IAA; 5 μg/50 μg of proteins, 20 min at 37°C).
alkylation concentration: alkylated with iodoacetamide (IAA; 5 μg/50 μg of proteins, 20 min at 37°C).
cleavage agent: with sequencing-grade modified trypsin (1 μg/50 μg protein; Promega, Madison, WI, United States).
fragmentation method: fragmentation by collision induced dissociation (CID): osteopontin (VAEFGSSEEK, collision energy = 24.64 V).
instrument: interfaced to a quadrupole time-of-flight mass spectrometer (QTOF, Agilent 6530).
labeling: peptides were covalently modified by “light” or “heavy” dimethyl.
reduction reagent: reduced with DTT (1 μg/50 μg of proteins; 30 min at 37°C).
reduction concentration: reduced with DTT (1 μg/50 μg of proteins; 30 min at 37°C).
